properties.title: Atelier Transpart
properties.description:
***
📝 [Internal S&D Documentation](https://ufgat.sharepoint.com/:w:/r/sites/OG-Summersemester20242/Freigegebene%20Dokumente/General/Academic%20Year%202025-26/BA_StadtLaborLinz_Frankviertel/SOCIAL%20RELATIONS/Social%20groups/9.%20ATELIER%20TRANSPART.docx?d=wdd0289586e53493d95f8ff65a70f709a&csf=1&web=1&e=rBoNL6)
***
📍 [Spacial implications map of Kiosk]
***

The gallery / studio is located on Wimhölzelstraße in Franckviertel, Linz in a former Pixel Hotel, an art project as part of Linz 09. The studio includes a work- and showroom and a fully functional small living unit.

The association was founded in 2016, is based in Linz, and aims to build, support, and facilitate transnational exchange of organizations and initiatives that link political and cultural/artistic content and promote societal participation.

This is to be achieved, among other things, through the implementation of projects, consulting individuals and organizations, as well as through project collaborations with organizations pursuing similar goals.

The *Foodcoop Franck Kistl* stands for food sovereignty, good neighborly relations, sustainability, solidarity, environmental protection, and new ideas.

***

# Was ist der Kiosk?
A joint project involving various initiatives, associations, and private individuals in Linz’s Franckviertel district. The neighborhood association Franck Kistl has been involved from the very beginning and has since become a very strong driving force within this initiative. It is also committed to the long-term use of this special place in this unique district.

The initiative focuses on the participatory use of a unique building—almost entirely vacant—together with its surrounding open spaces, which hold great architectural and symbolic significance for the neighborhood. The initiative was launched in autumn 2019 as part of the social platform of the district office “Leben im Franckviertel” (“Life in the Franckviertel”).

properties.title: Nachbarschafts Café
properties.description:
***
📝 [Internal S&D Documentation](https://ufgat.sharepoint.com/:w:/r/sites/OG-Summersemester20242/Freigegebene%20Dokumente/General/Academic%20Year%202025-26/BA_StadtLaborLinz_Frankviertel/SOCIAL%20RELATIONS/Social%20groups/03.%20NACHBARCAFE.docx?d=w9b5f6b4afe9a46e8a75f9a02bd299ac8&csf=1&web=1&e=KhSGPc)
***
It all started parallelly to Kiosk foundation around 2019. People from Kiosk (Anna Janssen and others), started organizing some meetings at the Stadtteilzentrum to discuss about the future of the Neighborhood. During that times the assosiation called PROGES took in charge the space in Stieglbauernstraße 11 in order to promote cultural initiatives. Here the need found the offer so this woman Anita Kunik, started this initiative of the Nachbarcafè every tuesday in that space. Usually PROGES works with 3 years last long project, but since the nachbarcafè was running so well they extended the rental contract with GWG. 

Meanwhile Anita Kunik was hired by the Uberdemtellerand assosiation. Here appears Karin (the woman who’s keeping alive Nachbarcafè now), who got to know this initiative after participating one day at the Kiosk’s community garden. This initiative involved her totally and really helped her heal after depression illness.   

Now (January 2026) we arrived at the crash point because the contract has just expired and GWG wants Karin to pay, she truly believe she can find financial support by friends but the reality is a bit different.

properties.title: pro mente
properties.description:
***
📝 [Internal S&D Documentation](https://ufgat.sharepoint.com/:w:/r/sites/OG-Summersemester20242/Freigegebene%20Dokumente/General/Academic%20Year%202025-26/BA_StadtLaborLinz_Frankviertel/SOCIAL%20RELATIONS/Social%20groups/12.%20ProMente.docx?d=wa1228932564e4c77a65f2dc7d29a22b7&csf=1&web=1&e=Ho5t9v)
***
📍 [Spacial implications map of Kiosk]
***
It’s one of the biggest organisations which supports people with mental and social difficulties in Upper Austria. It was created in 1964 and got the name “pro mente infirmis”. They were created to protect the rights of people with mental issues. 

In 1967 was opened the first consulting and supportive services 

In 1970-1980 was invented first addiction prevention programs and support of youth.

In the 1990s the organisation started helping with work integration. They created the organisation called “Arbeitsassistenz” and programs which help people with mental disorders to find employment. 

Over the last 30 years Pro Mente OÖ became the biggest professional support system providing psychotherapy, consultations, mobile assistance, help with finding housing, prevention of addiction, support of youth and labor integration programs. 

They get funding through subsidies, partnerships with government agencies and other sources such as Land OberÖsterreich, AMS, etc.

properties.title: Schlot
properties.description:
***
📝 [Internal S&D Documentation](https://ufgat.sharepoint.com/:w:/r/sites/OG-Summersemester20242/Freigegebene%20Dokumente/General/Academic%20Year%202025-26/BA_StadtLaborLinz_Frankviertel/SOCIAL%20RELATIONS/Social%20groups/02.%20SCHLOT.docx?d=w2a84cebfd91d49f28503a797ec71184c&csf=1&web=1&e=GxvyZR)
***
📍 [Spacial implications map of Kiosk]
***
The cultural association Schlot was founded in 2015. Birgit Kolbinger was looking for her own studio. She found a hall in the Frankviertel, on the site of the former mattress factory "Fehrer." 

Schlot started with 3 artists and 2 musicians and gradually extended and expanded their rooms. 

It took 5 years to get fundings by the city. Until then, all members had to chip in with their private money. 

By now Schlot hosts 10 artists and 5 bands use their rehearsal room

💡 support in implementing ideas fort he

properties.title: STOP
properties.description:
***
📝 [Internal S&D Documentation](https://ufgat.sharepoint.com/:w:/r/sites/OG-Summersemester20242/Freigegebene%20Dokumente/General/Academic%20Year%202025-26/BA_StadtLaborLinz_Frankviertel/SOCIAL%20RELATIONS/Social%20groups/6.%20STOP%20(1).docx?d=w9267640b22eb427882be9c8d894b707a&csf=1&web=1&e=mNVpqn)
***
📍 [Spacial implications map of Kiosk]
***
Domestic violence and intimate partner violence unfortunately occur everywhere. In the summer of 2021, the Linz Women’s Shelter decided to launch the project StoP – Neighborhoods Without Partner Violence in the Linz-Urfahr district. In the summer of 2022, the project was expanded to include the Franckviertel district.

Currently, StoP women’s tables are taking place in Linz-Urfahr, and StoP neighborhood tables (to which men are also warmly invited) are being held in Franckviertel. However, we would like to explicitly invite people from all districts of Linz, as well as those who work in Linz, to join us at the women’s or neighborhood tables.

properties.title: Über den Tellerrand
properties.description:
***
📝 [Internal S&D Documentation](https://ufgat.sharepoint.com/:w:/r/sites/OG-Summersemester20242/Freigegebene%20Dokumente/General/Academic%20Year%202025-26/BA_StadtLaborLinz_Frankviertel/SOCIAL%20RELATIONS/Social%20groups/05.%20U%CC%88BER%20DEN%20TELLERRAND.docx?d=w14a09fee11d84be2aa82b130306e26c9&csf=1&web=1&e=p6yYFY)
***
📍 [Spacial implications map of Kiosk]
***
Since 2016, people from different cultures have been coming together in Linz. By cooking and eating together, people get to know one another. Since October 2018, Sternküche has been based in Linz’s Franckviertel district.

Sternküche is an open place for everyone. Here, people cook, eat, learn, and laugh together. Community and togetherness are at the heart of what we do.
